description: Your Canvaspace management dashboard.
Plus button to find the create Canva workspace User Interface
Create a Canva workspace by filling the details of your choice.
You can also update the details when ever you feel there needs to be changes and hit Save Workspace.
Now the Canva workspace is created, click on the double arrow icon to enter the Canva Workspace(Canvaspace).

Go to and click the icon on the top left, right under the header navigation. This is the Canvaspace hub to see canvaspace details, access layouts to create different type of data, adjust canva size, and more.
The Fragment Hub enables you to create different types of data within the Canvaspace. The Help button leads you to the Academy page to train user how to use MindCanvas correctly.

The Delete button opnes a box to confirm delete the current canvas and its data. Deleting any kind of data is risky. The refresh button is an extra for when the page did not load properly due to possible internet issues.
Click Fragment Hub to show the available ways of creating a Data Fragment, in our case the demo has only the Text Fragment. Click Text to display the layout.
Enter some text of your choice and hit SAVE.
Drag the Input layout away from the created Data Fragment containing your new information. Click the 'i' icon on the left of the Data Fragment for options.

Click Edit to display the edit window where you can type new information in on the right hand side. Use 'Copy to Clipboard' to save typing stress. When ready, Paste it using 'Write lastest clipboard',  add more info by typing it in and hit the Update button to save your extra data.
To close the Data Fragment you go backt to he Fragment hub anc click on Text Fragment again to hide the input layout.

Back to the options menu clicking on the 'i' icon, you will see the Reorganize data fragment. Click it to enable dragging the data fragment to a new position. and hit Update Coordinates to save the new position. When done, click 'I'm done' to collapse the drag window.
Lastly, There are two buttons, one which looks like a shield that enables the delete function; Two, named as 'Delete' which is a delete button to remove that single data fragment permanently.
Congratulations on completing these tasks!
Keep an eye on notifications; they are important.
Navigate back to the Canvas Management page and click on the Account Info text on the top middle. This is your account profile.
Be advised: Only follow the following step to remove your account, otherwise just read and do not execute the next instruction.
Click the Unlock button to disable the lock that prevents accidental account deletion; this action is irreversible. It's instant. All your data will be permanently deleted.
